name: fleet-operations
description: Web application for fleet managers to monitor vehicles, drivers, and trip data through a customizable tile-based dashboard and a research workspace.

scripts.lint: if [ -d src/backend ] || [ -d src/frontend ]; then npm run lint --workspaces --if-present; else echo 'No module sources yet — skipping lint.'; fi
scripts.typecheck: if [ -d src/backend ] || [ -d src/frontend ]; then npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present; else echo 'No module sources yet — skipping typecheck.'; fi
scripts.test: if [ -d src/backend ] || [ -d src/frontend ]; then npm run test --workspaces --if-present; else echo 'No module sources yet — skipping test.'; fi
scripts.build: if [ -d src/backend ] || [ -d src/frontend ]; then npm run build --workspaces --if-present; else echo 'No module sources yet — skipping build.'; fi
